Who I Am

Creator. Strategist.
Builder.

  • Social Media & Content Marketing
  • Meta & Google Ads
  • Video Editing & Voiceovers
  • Canva Design
  • Google Business Manager

AI-Powered Performance Ads Generative AI Mastermind Google Ads Search Make Foundation

I'm a Digital Marketing Manager at SKD Propworld Pvt. Ltd., where I manage the full content pipeline — from scripting and filming to editing, publishing, and paid campaigns across YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn.

What makes my work stand out: I don't just post content. I build systems. I created SKDCRM, a custom sales CRM for the company, and regularly use AI tools and no-code automation to scale what a small team can do.

In the hyper-competitive YEIDA (Yamuna Expressway Industrial Development Authority) real estate niche, our Instagram page has the highest follower count among all competitors — built entirely through organic, consistent, value-driven content.

"From a media background (BAJMC, IIMT) to newsroom editing to digital marketing — every step trained me to communicate fast, create quality, and measure what matters."

SKD Propworld Pvt. Ltd.
Digital Marketing Manager
